violations.text: A utensil was observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2025

The door to the outside, located in the in the back storage area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2025

The walls and ceiling in the ware-washing/back storage area has an accumulation of dust. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2025
The ceiling in the front prep area and ware-washing area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (vegetable slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2023

nspector observed lowboy refrigeration holding ambient temperatures at 50 degrees Fahrenheit. Establishment not allowed to store any TCS foods in refrigeration unit until repaired. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (deli slicer and veggie slicers) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 09/06/2023

Various food product was observed held at (44-49) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/06/2023

Inspector observed lowboy refrigeration holding ambient temperatures at 50 degrees Fahrenheit. Per interview with PIC, food was stored in lowboy overnight and transferred to sandwich line in morning. PIC voluntarily disposed of food(See disposal) . Establishment not allowed to store any TCS foods in refrigeration unit until repaired.PIC must send proof of services prior to reinspection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/06/2023
Observed lighting in the walk in freezer was out. Sufficient lightening must be available to employees to perform certain job functions. New Violation. Correct By: 09/06/2023
